subject: Action needed: beagle planning in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q2 review | INIT-3921
body: Here is a progress summary for the beagle plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Mahatma Gandhi as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-3921. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: handoff, readiness.
